panels.description: Medium shot of Alice looking down at the baby in her arms with a worried, anxious expression. Alice wears her classic blue dress. The baby looks peculiar, slightly snout-like features, sketchy ink lines, soft Victorian lighting.

bubbles.text: Don't grunt, that's not at all a proper way of expressing yourself.

panels.description: Extreme close-up on the baby's face. It looks clearly like a piglet now. Alice's hand is visible touching its cheek, looking for tears. High contrast, focus on the grotesque transition.

bubbles.text: But perhaps it was only sobbing...

panels.description: Alice standing in the woods, watching a small piglet trotting away into the dense, dark foliage. Alice looks relieved but perplexed. Low angle shot.

bubbles.text: If you're going to turn into a pig, my dear, I'll have nothing more to do with you. Mind now!

panels.description: Alice walking through the woods, suddenly stopping as she spots the Cheshire Cat perched high on a gnarled tree branch. The cat is grinning, its eyes glowing faintly in the shadows.

bubbles.text: It makes rather a handsome pig, I think.

panels.description: Close-up of the Cheshire Cat's grinning face. Long, sharp claws are visible curled around the branch. Detailed fur and teeth. The atmosphere is tense and mysterious.

bubbles.text: Cheshire Puss, I don't much care where—so long as I get somewhere.

panels.description: Wide shot: The Cat pointing in two different directions with both hands. Alice listens attentively. The woods appear distorted, leaning in toward the characters.

bubbles.text: In that direction lives a Hatter; in that direction, a March Hare. They're both mad.
